news.title: Microsoft Says Quantum Chip Is a Big Step Forward. Not So Fast.
news.summary: Microsoft  says its new quantum chip, refined using artificial intelligence, brings a scalable quantum computer within reach before the end of the decade.  The company on Tuesday unveiled the latest iteration of its Majorana quantum processor, which it redesigned using AI.  Microsoft asserted that the new chip is 1,000 times more reliable than its predecessor, effectively halving the timeline to build a scalable quantum computer.
